title: Faithful 32x Modded
description: Classic Faithful 32x with full modded support.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6308a706921929ce5d5af1aaf7748b5e6c7d5600_0.webp)

## **Classic Faithful 32x with full modded support**

This project is a complete collection of all available Faithful 32x mod textures for older versions of Minecraft using the Programmer Art texture style (pre-1.14.x). Originally created by Vattic and revived through community efforts, the Faithful 32x pack has grown over time to support over 300 mods. This project in particular is a new fork of the old, outdated F32 Modded project managed by the defunct 'F32 Organization', and features hundreds of new textures and long-overdue QoL fixes. Check out the changelogs to see what's being added!

Vanilla Minecraft textures are included and do not need to be downloaded separately.


### New Dark Mode add-on now available!

[Get it here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithful-32x-modded-dark-mode-addon)

 

### Links

[F32x Modded on GitHub](https://github.com/Vubsagwer/Faithful-32x-Modded)
To make a request, report a bug, or to contribute to the project.

[Faithful Website](https://www.faithfulpack.net/)
Faithful pack downloads, Discord server links, and more.



### Other projects

[Not Enough Pixels (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/not-enough-pixels-faithful-64x-32x)
An effort to bring 64x support to modded Minecraft.

[Scape and Run: Parasites 32x (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/scape-and-run-parasites-resource-pack)
32x textures for Scape and Run: Parasites

[Faithful32-GTCEu (GitHub)](https://github.com/marisathewitch/Faithful32-GTCEu)
Faithful 32x resource pack for GregTech CE: Unofficial.
